Just giving my views about Sirens. To me, the show explores the themes of family relationships, romance, control, paranoïa and fear, judgement, appearance vs reality, childhood neglect, rancour, sister relationships, wealth, friendship and servitude. It shows you how neglect and abuse can motivate someone to do anything to avoid reliving the same thing.  Simone doesn't want to go through the same thing. It's her worst nightmare. Michaela controls every little movement of her husband too much and is too attached to her image. Some are commenting that he is manipulating. With her controlling personality, I see that he cannot breathe with her. He likes fishing and staying in simple clothes. The irony is that she controls her husband so much; but doesn't see any risk in sending Simone to spy on him. She always saw Simone as an inferior person that she has to protect; a little puppy. Simone was a second version of Michaela; a mini Michaela; but wasn't even respected by the staff. In the end, she is no longer a mini Michaela but ironically replaces her. I think about that scene: Michaela putting her dirty chewing gum in her mouth and making her follow her around for any petty reason. It's a kind of foreshadowing for later. She places the dirty chewing gum in her mouth but later on, she unvoluntarily places Simone into the forest with her husband. Their working and friendly relationship is too fusional and emotionally suffocating. The story also provides us with an analysis of a fragile and toxic sister relationship. Simon's sister persists in saving her. She is paranoid about everything and she even believes that it's a sect and that Michaela is trying to harm her sister and killed someone. She loves her father so much but he was the one to truely traumatize Simone, not Michaela. Michaela has a difficult personality but she has a good heart until the betrayal of her husband. The sister is too judgemental towards  Michaela and Simone's relationship with men. The irony is that Simone's life wouldn't necessarily get any better if she went back to her previous home. The sister doesn't recognise Simone in the end. She sees a confident woman who likes money ,protection and status.
